clinicianReview: Review any oncology medication question with an oncology clinician, pharmacist, or genetic counselor who knows the full cancer, medication, and clinical context.
Use the appendix to see which pharmacogene, cancer-context, and treatment-context inputs were unavailable.
Do not use sample rows or derived PGx evidence alone to make screening, prevention, treatment, medication, or dosing decisions.

references.title: FDA Table of Pharmacogenomic Biomarkers in Drug Labeling

genotypeSummary.effect: One increased function allele and one normal function allele
One no function allele and one normal function allele
One decreased function allele and one normal function allele
One no function allele and one normal function allele
Observed sample appendix row for DPYD c.1627A>G (*5)
Two normal-risk alleles in the sample appendix
One increased function allele and one no function allele
Sample appendix labels the diplotype as indeterminate
The public sample appendix lists exploratory functional-assessment rows for oncology medication genes.
genotypeSummary.genotype: ABCB1, ABCC2, CDA, ERCC2, and VEGFA multi-variant rows are visible in the sample appendix.
genotypeSummary.variantId: selected exploratory rows visible in appendix

genotypeSummary.effect: The public sample appendix combines exploratory variant rows and no-function-altering-variant rows for additional oncology PGx genes.
genotypeSummary.genotype: CYP2A6 *1/*1 plus ESR1, MTHFR, and SLC22A1 rows; ABL1, AKT1, DSP, ERBB2, ESR2, and UGT1A4 no function-altering variants are visible in the sample appendix.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Normal function or altered function as shown in the sample appendix
genotypeSummary.variantId: selected exploratory and no-variant rows visible in appendix

probabilities.label: Calibrated personal probability
probabilities.note: The deterministic report body does not quantify medication response, adverse reaction, diagnosis, treatment response, prognosis, or dosing probabilities.

uncertainty: Sample-report rows are output-format evidence, not local clinical decisions.
Derived pharmacogene calls do not include the full medication, diagnosis, treatment, ancestry, assay, and clinician-reviewed context needed for medication decisions.
Missing inputs are listed explicitly instead of being inferred.
missingInputs: Authenticated marketplace detail-page extraction is not available yet.
Cancer diagnosis, tumor type, stage, treatment regimen, medication list, dose, treatment history, oncology clinician review, phenotype confidence, and medication-decision context are not supplied.
Cancer-risk model, inherited-carrier assessment, tumor testing, treatment-planning evidence, and expanded oncology PGx coverage are unavailable unless supplied by validated local evidence.
limitations: This local artifact uses public sample-report structure and synthetic derived evidence for validation.
It does not estimate cancer risk, diagnose cancer, infer inherited-carrier status, classify variants, recommend screening or prevention, assess prognosis, or plan treatment.
It does not include tumor testing, treatment regimen context, private variants, full CYP2D6 copy-number resolution, validated clinical medication review, or clinician interpretation.
